data.name: tapas-lem
data.description: Returns bullet-point answers from semantic cache. ~40 ms latency and ~0.001 Wh energy usage. Around 3000× cheaper than full inference.

data.name: tapas-llm
data.description: Full GPU inference for detailed responses. ~2000 ms latency and ~3.0 Wh energy usage. Use when cache misses or richer prose is required.

data.name: tapas-hybrid
data.description: Smart router that automatically selects cache (>0.85 confidence) or full LLM. ~40–2000 ms latency and ~0.001–3.0 Wh energy usage.
